children.name: Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog

zh.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd是Dafydd Ap Ieuan的兒子，出生。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd是Dafydd Ap Ieuan的儿子，出生。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd was born as the son of Dafydd Ap Ieuan. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd est né, fils de Dafydd Ap Ieuan. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd wurde, als Sohn von Dafydd Ap Ieuan geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd è nato il come figlio di Dafydd Ap Ieuan. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap DafyddはDafydd Ap Ieuanの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd(은)는 Dafydd Ap Ieuan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd nasceu filho de Dafydd Ap Ieuan. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd родился. Его отца звали Dafydd Ap Ieuan. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Dafydd Fychan Ap Dafydd nació como hijo de Dafydd Ap Ieuan. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.

th.–: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.–Male: ถึงแก่กรรม
